programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Franklin County officers comfort a woman after her partner's alleged stash ends their evening; in Florida, a man's self-proclaimed "training" video leads to legal trouble; in Warwick, officers respond to a reported break-in.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: The K9 units are on the chase with pursuits in Richland and Pasco Counties, a fleeing vehicle triggers a high-speed pursuit in Franklin County, and it's sassy backtalk in Mission, Texas.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A K9 in Greene County tracks down a suspected stolen car driver; in Warwick, a bar patron insists he wasn't driving; in Mission, officers question a confused burglary suspect.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In El Paso, police engage in a struggle with a suspect who reportedly attempts to flee; in Mission, officers respond to a serious car accident; in Greene County, a man believed to be an escaped convict leads police on a wild pursuit.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Franklin County officers comfort a woman after her partner's alleged stash ends their evening; in Florida, a man's self-proclaimed "training" video leads to legal trouble; in Warwick, officers respond to a reported break-in.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.desc: The buyers battle for the best unit available in Torrance, Calif.; Ivy finds success when he changes tactics; Brandi puts Jarrod on a budget.

programme.desc: Barry hopes to expand his collection of oddities; a rare bonus is discovered in a hidden compartment.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away; Kenny uses Mary as a shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.desc: The buyers visit Perris, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi bid on a unit filled with power tools and potential; Darrell brings along a fleet of trucks to haul away his anticipated high-volume purchases.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers gamble on storage units in Las Vegas; Darrell bets on a locker covered with blankets; Barry appraises a sign from the 1940s and makes a new friend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man unleashes a tirade at a female motorist after a rear-end collision in Florida. A worker servicing a stoplight over a road gets nailed by a semi in Louisiana. A gun-wielding sports car driver confronts a family in Florida. A motorcyclist gets clotheslined by a tow truck cable in Brazil. An Arkansas woman is flung from a three-wheeled trike into the path of an oncoming bus.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A Bronx driver gets a heavy dose of instant karma; a woman in Long Beach, Calif., finds herself in a standoff against an entire parking lot in an attempt to hold an empty spot; an allegedly stolen Maserati leads to a tragic end.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Vernon, Calif., a motorcyclist escalates an altercation on the road by smashing a driver's rear windshield; when a driver in Flushing, N.Y., allegedly blocks a mobility van from unloading wheelchair passengers, bystanders intervene.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In a Rhode Island drive-through, a family is horrified as an enraged woman appears to stab their vehicle; an off-duty officer in Alabama is run down outside his home by a stranger's SUV.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A 60-year-old driver in Florida is attacked by a teen; a fight erupts on a street in England after a cyclist confronts a driver about using his cell phone; a Salt Lake City driver goes airborne; a Texas motorcyclist falls onto train tracks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A woman's outburst in the street causes a roadblock in Maryland. A wreck on a Chicago highway leaves a trooper in the crosshairs of traffic. A driver in North Carolina ignores a warning about a sinkhole. Two semis collide in Texas when one turns left into oncoming traffic. A storefront crash in China is caused by a very unusual driver.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A car owner in Indiana opens fire at a pickup truck charging toward him in his driveway; a tight lane change prompts a motorcyclist to strike a car's mirror; police in Brazil engage in a harrowing pursuit of a couple on a motorcycle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A dispute over a saved parking space leads to a brawl in New York. On a bridge in Connecticut, a confrontation between a driver and pedestrians escalates quickly. A sports car driver in Georgia turns off his traction control and pays the price into oncoming traffic. A minivan runs a red light as a man in a mobility scooter is crossing in California. In Malaysia, two vehicles engage in a fierce back-and-forth on the highway.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A mother in Philadelphia takes on a biker who shatters her window. In England, two drivers get into a street fight that appears to involve a rock. A school bus in South Carolina veers off-road and slams into a house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A crossing guard in Pennsylvania fights an impatient motorist, while in Texas, a four-car pileup leads to a stabbing on the freeway; in Thailand, an exploding manhole cover propels a motorcyclist upward.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man in San Diego strikes an SUV with a bat; a woman is sent flying by a garbage truck; a semi truck driver's life hangs in the balance when an erratic driver causes her rig to careen halfway off a bridge in Louisville.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A motorist brandishes a knife at a semi driver after they collide on an Albuquerque highway. Police in Ohio utilize multiple PIT maneuvers during a high-speed chase. An SUV driver attempts a multi-point turn while dangling off a steep drop in China. A man in Kentucky attempts to document an allegedly dangerous driver, who then pulls a firearm on him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A motorist struggles to break up a fistfight between drivers in New Jersey. A cyclist turns traffic vigilante in England and clashes with commuters. rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Apollo Beach, Fla., a woman brandishes a gun after an alleged altercation on the road; after a wild chase through downtown Los Angeles, a man attempts to flee from police on a skateboard.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In a Michigan parking lot, a truck driver repeatedly rams a car in a seemingly random attack; on a remote road in Oklahoma, motorcyclists get into an altercation with the driver of a pickup truck who calls in a sibling and a neighbor for backup.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An entitled district attorney in New York gets contentious with police after a speeding infraction; a motorist blinded by the sun in California launches his SUV over a cliff; a dispute involving ex-girlfriends in Georgia.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: At a red light in Phoenix, a man gets out of his car to confront another motorist, who ends up driving directly into him; when a large truck slows traffic on a small road in New Jersey, an angry driver gets out of his car with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A New York City driver gets into a brutal street fight with an electric unicycler after allegedly cutting him off; a motorcyclist risks his own life to help a driver with a stalled car get off the highway.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Drivers in Harlem hurl insults during an intense standoff over a parking spot. In England, bystanders intervene when two boys appear to take a motorbike that doesn't belong to them. On a Minnesota highway, a wrong-way driver leaves a ten-mile path of destruction. Drivers in Thailand face the wrath of a road raging beast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A driver in Los Angeles squares off with a group of cyclists in a battle over the right-of-way; a motorcyclist in Arkansas pursues a driver he believes left the scene of an accident; after a fender bender in China, a woman gets physical.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A sideswipe on a Texas freeway leads to a heated confrontation; a motorist rear-ends a biker in Australia, then snatches his bag; a pedestrian takes a swing at a trooper on a Florida highway; a right-of-way mix-up causes a collision in Texas; a California woman discovers a wild bear trapped inside her SUV; a driver in Turkey tries to chase down a tow truck that seized his car.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A traffic jam spat on a California freeway between a motorcyclist and driver turns destructive; in Minnesota, two bicyclists square off with a driver over a right-of-way dispute; a pickup towing a multi-ton drum in Alabama inadvertently releases its payload into oncoming traffic; wildfire fighters in California race to escape an inferno.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At a Texas superstore, a customer gets irate after an employee asks to check her receipt before she leaves. In Florida, a man allegedly attacks a couple in a restaurant... and a server who joins the brawl may know more than she admits. A simple trip to the store turns into a heated confrontation in a Michigan parking lot when one customer accuses another of illegally parking in a handicap space. In Thailand, a soccer player for a local team who refuses to pay his bar tab is confronted.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: On a flight in Florida, passengers turn on a woman who rushes to the front of the line waiting to deboard. In Punta Gorda, Florida, a fishing dispute explodes when an enraged captain boards another boater's vessel. In San Francisco, California, a couple denied service erupts inside a restaurant and has to be removed as the chaos spills into the street. In Englewood, Colorado, a late-night diner becomes a battleground when a dispute between tables ignites a massive brawl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At a Key Largo resort, officers are called to handle a couple who are allegedly causing a disturbance; at an airport in Florida, TSA agents attempt to stop a passenger who's acting erratically at a security checkpoint.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At a Dallas airport, confusion over seating on a plane ends with police intervention; a dispute over boat parking in Montgomery, Ala., leads to a huge brawl on the docks; a rideshare passenger in Chicago takes issue with a driver's dashcam.

programme.desc: A heavy hitter who has a long history with Dave arrives in Newport Beach, Calif.; Barry visits the doctor.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tiptoes down memory lane in Orange, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod get to work on a tool locker; Darrell and his granddaughter dig up a creepy find.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: A Metamorphic Layer of True Romanticism
programme.desc: Ivy takes it to the house in nearby Lancaster, Calif., while Dave takes advantage of being so close to Ivy; Justin pushes all of Rene's buttons and comes out ahead.

programme.desc: Jarrod has difficulty finding his groove in Riverside, Calif.; an item stumps Dave; Ivy tries a new strategy; Mary discovers the romantic side of purchasing lockers.

programme.desc: The buyers look for textbooks and rare university artifacts in Fullerton, Calif.; Barry uncovers antique vinyl; Jarrod and Brandi battle their colleagues.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: An elderly woman calls for help from her burning home; two officers uniquely handle a noise complaint.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: An officer on horseback pursues an armed suspect through the crowded streets of New Orleans; a high-speed chase ends with a flipped vehicle; an officer and civilians in Alaska free a man pinned beneath his flaming vehicle.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Ocala, Fla., officers pursue a suspect in a stolen vehicle; in Athens, Ga., police respond to a burning car wreck; Tennessee deputies apprehend a flatbed truck hauling away a stolen excavator.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Albuquerque, N.M., police stop a carjacking in progress; an intoxicated movie star is arrested in Georgia; a fleeing suspect shoots an officer.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A belligerent suspect strips naked during his arrest; an officer responds to an armed robbery at a liquor store; deputies save a woman trapped in a house fire.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A vehicle is taken with kids in the back seat; a Florida man blames a horse for a robbery; an officer defends himself after being attacked with a sword.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A trooper's cruiser is totaled on the freeway; a country music singer gets mouthy during a DUI arrest; a helicopter chase leads to a shootout in Florida.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Tulsa, Okla., officers pursue a stolen pickup truck; Cleveland police respond to a man breaking windows at a church; Pasco County, Fla., deputies apprehend a fleeing suspect in a foot chase.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Pennsylvania troopers caught in a roadside gunfight; Utah Department of Public Safety helicopter tracks stolen vehicle; officers drive shooting victim to the hospital when EMS is delayed.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: An angry man threatens officers with a rifle; a traffic stop escalates into a dramatic shoot-out; officers commandeer a jet ski to make a water rescue.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: High-speed chase in the streets of Louisiana; drugs and guns are seized during Florida traffic stop; deputies rescue a hiker having a stroke.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Altercation in a hospital waiting room; shootout on the streets of San Francisco; suspected DUI ends in juggling.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: An officer is shot during a DWI stop in New Mexico; police respond to shots fired at an apartment complex; an officer is the first to respond to a house fire.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: State troopers respond to reports of a vehicle driving erratically; Florida deputies conduct a car search during a traffic stop; officers in Ohio respond to an overdose call.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A woman steals a police SUV; shootout on the streets of Denver; a fleeing robbery suspect collides with a deputy's vehicle.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Shoplifter fires at police during pursuit; Florida deputies and K-9 look for drugs during traffic stop; police rescue children from roof.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Cisco responds to a break-in at the last place you'd ever expect - the Fraternal Order of Police Lodge while K9 Karma is deployed on a combative suspect who refuses to go quietly into the night. After his handler is struck by a vehicle, K9 Jakko continues on the pursuit alone, locking onto the trail of an armed suspect and when K9 Mickey makes the takedown, he pays a painful price in the process.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After a father takes police on a high-speed chase with his toddler on board, K9 Keanu is deployed into a volatile standoff and every second counts. K9 Kyro tracks down the critical piece of evidence: a gun tossed by a fleeing suspect. K9 Lupo pushes through dense, punishing brush, getting tangled under low branches but refuses to quit, fighting through to make the apprehension. Meanwhile, after saving his handler's life, K9 Taco becomes more than a partner.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Corporal in Pasco County ends up with a bloody cut on his head after subduing an aggressive suspect. Stop sticks, a K9 unit and a PIT maneuver are all deployed by police in Tulsa to stop a fleeing suspect in an allegedly stolen vehicle. Officers in Walton County find 3 pairs of women's underwear and a used condom when they search a suspect accused of assault with a vehicle.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts; and K9 Red barrels into action after a suspect crashes into a police cruiser and then tears off.
